title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・BNW、激走

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the BNW showdown is... Narita
Taishin! Narita Taishin is victorious!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Nice. That wasn't bad at all. I feel good.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I guess winning races really is what I want. I want
to keep winning until I can truly believe in
myself.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I had no idea winning could make me feel so
happy...)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nooooo! I was running at my fullest of full power,
but I still lost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm sad for myself... but happy for you, Taishin!
Congratulatiooons!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're our dear rival for good reason.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm almost dumbfounded at how great you are!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... It's only because I've got you guys.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin rises to the top of BNW amid
seemingly endless waves of cheers and praise for
her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, I wanna talk to you about my next race.
choice_data_list: Aw, yeah! Lay it on me!
Aw, yeah! Lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Would it kill you to act like a normal person for
once? Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've come this far, there's one race I
definitely wanna run in, and that's the Grand Prix
at the end of the year—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm pretty sure both Ticket and Hayahide
will be entering it, so I might as well too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I want to push myself and see what I'm really
made of.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I want to test this strength of mine that you
believe in so much.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Our next goal is now set for the Arima Kinen!
